name: Merge Summer
author: Poki
description: Merge Summer is a merge game where you get to whip up the perfect summer treats for your customers! Start with a simple waffle, then merge two waffles to create an even more delicious waffle topped with bananas. The more you merge, the fancier your desserts become! Unlock a wide variety of tasty summer desserts and drinks like cakes, ice cream, and refreshing coffees. Serve your customers to earn coins, which you can use to expand your merging space and create even more treats. Are you ready to craft the ultimate summer menu? How to play Merge Summer? Click to select an item, and drag to merge. Who created Merge Summer? Merge Summer is created by PotatoJam. Play their other games on Poki: 1010 Color Match , Monster Duo , Numbers , King of Mahjong , Bring me Cakes , Market Sort , Onet Paradise , Onet Master , and Solitaire Klondike 2.0 ! How can I play Merge Summer for free? You can play Merge Summer for free on Poki. Can I play Merge Summer on mobile devices and desktop? Merge Summer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
